meta.strategy: SNAS Bear Trader - selective cash-default bear rotation, sibling to LNAS-SNAS
meta.relationToLnasSnas: Shares LNAS-SNAS's GMMA feature set (on ^NDX/^IXIC) and from-scratch weighted k-NN classifier. LNAS-SNAS is always invested (LNAS or SNAS, long-biased default). This model defaults to a cash-like safe asset and only enters SNAS when every one of 8 independent bearish conditions agree, including a precondition that price recently traded near a 5-year high before rolling over. LNAS-SNAS is never traded here.

model.type: GMMA feature set + from-scratch weighted k-NN + 8-condition bearish gate
entryGate: overboughtPrecondition (within -8.0% of 5y high in last 60 sessions)
model.continuationGate: trendBreakdown, trendAlignment, relativeStrength, liquidity, pullbackNotExtended re-checked every session

meta.splitHandling: Split ratios are pulled live via yfinance Ticker.splits; no hardcoded table is required.
